name: Josh Hicks
subject: Reflecting on Flag Day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Friends —

Today, June 14, we celebrate Flag Day.

This day commemorates the adoption of the flag of the United States by the second Continental Congress. And today, more than ever, we should recognize the freedom, equality, and sacrifice that this flag represents.

Many members of our community are hurting right now. We still have work to do to build an America that treats everyone equally and that works for everyone equally. And we must ensure that, going forward, our flag stands for the principles of freedom and inclusivity so many have fought for.

As we think about the values our flag stands for, we must also remember how people in our society have fought time and again — from the Civil War to the Civil Rights Movement — to build a better, more equitable union.

As we remember where we started, we must also fix our eyes firmly on where we’re going. Together, we can honor the flag by building a better America, one that respects everyone equally and gives everyone the same chance to succeed.

Thank you for helping us to do that.

— Josh

| Dear Friend,

Every time I write to you, I always try to make it clear that this is not a one-man show. Fighting the corrupt establishment and taking back New Jersey is a _team_ sport — and I’m proud that you’re on my team. Without you, we wouldn’t have made it this far.

>From day one, I’ve made it clear that every penny we raise is used to spread our message. Patriots like you [came through in spades](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=4d984b6427&e=3e017fab0f), and that’s why I’ve got some fantastic news.

##
**[For a limited time, you can get a Singh for Senate yard sign for FREE!](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=98f06a9934&e=3e017fab0f)**
We normally sell these signs in packs at [our online store](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=d5013f7c03&e=3e017fab0f) for $40, but our recent fundraising was so overwhelmingly positive, we wanted to give something back.

To claim your sign, just head to this special [order page](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=5ca6adcf6a&e=3e017fab0f) we set up. Submit some basic info and that’s it — no credit card needed, no strings attached. Supplies are limited, so hurry!

As November approaches, I want patriots like you to **_take pride in backing the only true conservative in this race._** I want all the corrupt Democrats and RINOs to see our solidarity — they’ve got one _heck_ of a fight coming their way.

Don’t let your voice be silenced. [Head over to the special order page now to claim your FREE Singh for Senate yard sign.](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=e57d282b90&e=3e017fab0f)

Help us spread our message. And as always, my deepest thanks for your continued support.
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**

_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate

Team,

My finance team is currently reviewing our fundraising numbers, and we’re just a bit short of our mid-month benchmark.

**I want to take a moment to explain why this mid-month goal is so important.**

We set mid-month benchmarks to ensure we stay on track through our end of month goals, which allow us to budget in advance for things like new digital assets and vital organizing tools.

**This month, our mid-month benchmark is especially important because it’s our last one before our FEC quarterly deadline.** Our quarterly fundraising numbers not only help us forecast the next few months before our election,_it’s also public record. That means that if we hit the goals we’ve set, we will send a strong message to Republican special interest groups that this district**will** flip._

**Friend, here’s the thing: we have momentum.**

We’re running a grassroots, people-powered campaign focused on restoring faith in representative democracy -- _and all the while, our opponents are focused only on themselves and how extreme they can be for national attention._

We need you by our side, friend. | | Read what makes America unique
---

| Peter, As we celebrate another Flag Day, it is important to understand what makes this nation so unique and why the American flag is worth fighting for. Flag Day is a tribute to the day that the Second Continental Congress met to create a united fighting force, The Continental Army. Prior to this day, the colonists weren’t fighting under a single flag. So in the midst of the American Revolution, they met to create the first American flag in hopes of unifying the people in their fight against their oppressors, Great Britain. But on this Flag Day, we find ourselves in another battle. **We are fighting for the values that make this nation so different. We are a country rooted in the belief that our ultimate freedom comes from God, not the government. As Christianity declines in our nation and people lose sight of these truths, we are in serious danger.** Read the rest of the article [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvO5BMyhyfi7mrtcFcmhPGnwT3SKlLIXG1HMJ2ZRnmP7u8akG_l5XiQ8NjOJgAg3DwivS3zbHWsFihrkoFUObLqV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200614com01&n=2). clean_body: | | Read what makes America unique | Peter, As we celebrate another Flag Day, it is important to understand what makes this nation so unique and why the American flag is worth fighting for. Flag Day is a tribute to the day that the Second Continental Congress met to create a united fighting force, The Continental Army. Prior to this day, the colonists weren’t fighting under a single flag. So in the midst of the American Revolution, they met to create the first American flag in hopes of unifying the people in their fight against their oppressors, Great Britain. But on this Flag Day, we find ourselves in another battle. We are fighting for the values that make this nation so different. We are a country rooted in the belief that our ultimate freedom comes from God, not the government. As Christianity declines in our nation and people lose sight of these truths, we are in serious danger. Read the rest of the article . United. We Stand. P.S. Wear the colors of the flag! | | **Peter -- A Koch-backed group just made another hefty ad buy, after announcing they planned an "unprecedented" push into Texas to help save Sen. Cornyn's seat!**

_It couldn 't be clearer that they're worried about MJ._ Sen. Cornyn's approval ratings are weak -- underwater in multiple polls. With 34% of Texas voters undecided in the general election, Mitch McConnell is worried about losing his right-hand man in the Senate, and the corporate special interests are **PANICKING.**

**[Help MJ stand up to the special interests pouring money into Texas. name: Jim Oberweis
subject: Glad you’re on board!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/09794c845b1ea049/0270d7cc37817fdbc3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter,
Thanks again for signing up for email alerts from me and my team. I am incredibly honored to have your support.
I am eager to get to the work of restoring fiscal sanity to Washington, but before I ask for your vote, I want to share some things about me.

I have been incredibly humbled by the outpouring of support for our campaign so far.
As a successful entrepreneur and family man, I have seen what it takes to make things work in America. Over the course of my four-decade career as a small businessman, I’ve helped create thousands of jobs right here in Illinois. And I know first-hand how high taxes and burdensome regulations can prevent businesses from expanding and creating the new jobs we need, that’s why I am committed to reforming our government.
**I know the harsh reality of non-government finance, which means a successful small business owner must make sure that expenses don’t run ahead of revenues**. **My life experiences have my Midwestern Values: pro-tax cut, pro-spending cut, and pro-growth. I will work hard to cut the special-interest pork and end wasteful government spending in Washington DC and will stand up for traditional cultural values**.
Our 14th Congressional district needs a fighter who isn’t afraid to stand up to Lauren Underwood and her “socialist squad” pals trying to force their failed and dangerous socialist ideas on us.
This fight won’t be easy. Nancy Pelosi and her powerful socialist and big-spending special interest groups will be pouring money into this race – and we CAN win, but we need your help first.
**[Will you chip in $5 or $10 today to help build momentum for my campaign?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/09794c845b1ea049/d6b22de804d748c1c3d6b838967d376c/34533)**
If you’d like to learn more about my background and positions on key issues, you can visit my campaign website here.
\- Jim Oberweis
P.S. If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - you can [click here to unsubscribe](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476&c=34533&jid=09794c845b1ea049). | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/09794c845b1ea049/4a0b98373b88251dc3d6b838967d376c/34533)

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Any Hoosier can get tested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
On Friday, Indiana officially entered Stage 4 of Governor Holcomb’s Back on Track Plan (two days early!). | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

On Friday, Indiana officially entered Stage 4 of Governor Holcomb’s [**Back on Track Plan**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=43afdf94a9b348289e1f3b6e234c66ee&_e=jekOL0ZTg-_WQRne6_rFCmVBImCV_YUFPYriICjYvBJjVNdKEJvmxyp0x_SzZqMgLlkEVgi2k6WmlrC9_t8SYxXz_010be0elLjFjargbPbiXkThjdukuoBU75vDpZQb9wXBVFEhZzpenX1LGMn0rek9ByXq0tLuGYrOuas28Hkdv3wTM-Gd3hGPpO4E8PUfhrNrXQpPLN6wCVYkDuCpU-nefbXRITWy1x9O4NPcTfZrJm6DdPmAokqBy_8TGBymwD5JTYRCNqYgqZD6XrTO9R1e5DqzQ2pMaEK9drECAdH3JVG1C9SkwrX1UndZ7t6cl-5escJxe-F7TpKEJXwkGCTxqN3-eCG0Pf7rQjs8RbwBDWf61t7k-ufOeW9yjCfY) (two days early!).

It means that Hoosiers will be getting out more, as you’re likely doing this beautiful Indiana weekend. And as you’re getting out, _**we want to make sure that you have all the tools you need to stay safe.**_

You know the basics because you’ve been practicing them so well – socially distancing, wearing your face mask, and practicing great hygiene...

But last week, Governor Holcomb provided two big updates you might have missed that will continue to dramatically expand Indiana’s COVID-19 testing.
1. **ANY Hoosier can now get a COVID-19 test.**

With now more than 200 testing sites across Indiana, the state’s testing capacity is strong. And with that strength, any Hoosier can now make an appointment and get tested – you don’t need to be at a high-risk, and you don’t need to be showing symptoms. **[Find a site near you here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=43afdf94a9b348289e1f3b6e234c66ee&_e=jekOL0ZTg-_WQRne6_rFCnY6rUUDh7bzHjB0Gs2PhTjjbXgKIgH2PGK5mQSRAWaE5rfXrbYATlLDSk3J1f2MTZ8Df0zIePt1BIUMvJht417lx2gLlf378jDu7QJBQXnUwGDW7ZpEdXk7fgN2gz99479ArNcpiLCTjzsDtmipHHDfIex9LDtUcSyGfoIkCP-010aWX0UqYY_6sGeo7pQJYjl9ExsmKFiMuLQO4A38Z7dzA0M08rghP1Mrf12nH-EVj50oV5i0s2V-CDBFogFyGrcNvJ2R7XmB1vquduzTDrQSTj4Yi-4tdyUKNh4G9frlyjv3grS0cjJzHbOYQVdIjwoSuR6-lE3iT9LSUqNzoxX5EmLV5fKYv578XMj60_3DctGnB7KDuneS3I1Nwns0RQ%3D%3D) **
1. **Indiana is DOUBLING testing capacity.**

Through a partnership with Eli Lilly and the Indiana Hospital Association, the state is leveraging its buying power to compete more efficiently to purchase supplies, equipment and reagents for testing. By forming a network with 10 labs across Indiana, we’ll be doubling our current testing capacity.

Indiana has administered more than 335,000 COVID-19 tests across the state. But in order to keep that number growing, we need you! If you have any concerns that you may have COVID-19, [**go get tested.**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=43afdf94a9b348289e1f3b6e234c66ee&_e=jekOL0ZTg-_WQRne6_rFCnY6rUUDh7bzHjB0Gs2PhTjjbXgKIgH2PGK5mQSRAWaE5rfXrbYATlLDSk3J1f2MTZ8Df0zIePt1BIUMvJht417lx2gLlf378jDu7QJBQXnUwGDW7ZpEdXk7fgN2gz99479ArNcpiLCTjzsDtmipHHDfIex9LDtUcSyGfoIkCP-0afmhAJ1s-T2Z8nY3b7COfkUAMANEMooa_wRg15yu7ugrt3IqPbfEWe4ZCm-0smJUHS-xPZZbH-6KxlSebvakdftPr-6jrpvTiiw4AL-V_FPZM-ie-IijVkfRTPDe6ncOKXc03bNh5EPgc17jMxdqieg3OXleV3-0l4lxUjwmyPY7aEtigtxbjORW1lecjeDF-RNWEZToSW3D6iGxRSMyGQ%3D%3D) In many cases, it’s free!

Together, we’re fighting the spread of COVID-19 in Indiana, keeping our fellow Hoosiers safe, and keeping Indiana’s reopening safely on track. Keep up the great work, and continue to enjoy your weekend!

#BackonTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Don't Let Sen Gazelka Cave on Ending Walz' Illegal Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ending_walz_shutdown_priority&n=1)
---
Peter -- **We were so happy to report to you on Friday that the Minnesota Senate Republicans (with some Democrats) voted to end Walz' illegal powers. But now it appears that Gazelka and Senate Republicans are willing to bend over backwards to the Democrats.** Friday's vote means nothing unless the House also passes the resolution to end Walz' powers. The liberals in control of the House seem more concerned about spending, debt and criminal justice reform than stopping the pain of high unemployment and business failures due to Walz' illegal shutdown. So why on earth are Republicans in the Senate willing to pass a single piece of legislation with the House while Walz' is still unilaterally ordering businesses to be closed?! Paul Gazelka tweeted yesterday that the Senate Republicans "will introduce sweeping criminal justice reform measures supported by the People of Color and Indigenous (POCI) Caucus of the Minnesota House of Representatives". Also, on Friday Gazelka mentioned that Republicans' new target on the bonding debt bill is $1.3 Billion, an additional $300 Million from where they were one month before. That's money you will be on the hook to pay so that Democrats can fund their pork projects. **Why is Gazelka cutting deals with the far left Democrats in St Paul instead of holding firm on ending Walz' illegal powers???** Last year when Gazelka and Senate Republicans "cut deals" with the Democrats, we got a tax increase. The sick tax that was due to expire, was renewed by the Senate Republicans indefinitely. What a shame! The Senate finally did what YOU DEMANDED of them on Friday after two months of us calling and emailing. They came kicking and screaming, and possibly didn't really care to follow through with ending Walz' powers. Now they must think you and I aren't paying attention and we're going to take a break. But they misjudged us! **It's important for you to[immediately contact Paul Gazelka](mailto:sd09iq@mnsenate.lmhostediq.com) and your state senator and tell them...**
1. **Don't pass a single piece of legislation in this Special Session unless the House votes to end Walz' illegal emergency powers******
2. **Stop cutting deals with the Democrats while hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans are out of work and business owners are watching their dreams get squashed**

Gazelka has a problem on his hands. He has a Republican primary challenger this August who is calling him out for being a failure as a leader during the Walz' shutdown. It's time for Gazelka to prove him wrong and **REFUSE** to pass any legislation until Walz' powers are terminated. **If not, then Gazelka and Senate Republicans are just as guilty as the House Democrats for the unemployment and business failures that will ensue.** Please take a moment now to contact Senator Gazelka and your state senator.
## **Senator Paul Gazelka**
## **Phone: 651-296-4875**
## **Email:[ sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn](mailto:sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn)**
## [SEE WHO REPRESENTS ME](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ending_walz_shutdown_priority&n=2)
**In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ending_walz_shutdown_priority&n=3).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ending_walz_shutdown_priority&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ending_walz_shutdown_priority&n=5), software for leaders.
